title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 106.140 - Manner of taking depositions
text:
106.140.  Manner of taking depositions. — Such depositions shall be taken in the same manner and the same notice be given as where depositions are taken in circuit court.
(RSMo 1939 § 12844, A.L. 1945 p. 1319 § 12848) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11218; 1919 § 9191; 1909 § 10220
